name: python3-pypykatz

description:

This package contains Mimikatz implementation in pure Python.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pypykatz because Mimikatz implementation in pure Python (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pypykatz as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pypykatz [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pypykatz.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pypykatz with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pypykatz --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
